subject: Audit parameter choices across all scripts
description: Grep all preprocessing scripts for hardcoded parameters: MIN_PERIODS, LAGS, ROLLING_WINDOWS, HOLIDAY_MONTHS, TRAIN_END, VAL_END, log_transform flag. For each, record: value, location (file:line), category (CSD/Danskvand/etc), and justification (if documented). Output: parameter_audit.csv with {parameter, value, script, line, category, justification}
